Office of the Vice President, Division of Campus Life records
Cornell University. Vice President for Campus Affairs. Division of Campus Life
Gurowitz, William D.
4-6-1621
131 cubic feet. 131 cubic feet.
1967-1990. Reports, correspondence, financial records. Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 121 122 26 27 28 29 ======= 121 122 26 27 28 29 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2074362

Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
June 2018
EAD encoding:
Jude Corina, June 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files.
RELATED MATERIALS
See also Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-904, Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-1182, and Division of Student and Academic Services Records, #4-16-2926.
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
Arranged chronologically and by subject.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Cite As:
Vice President for Campus Affairs, Division of Campus Life. Records. #4-6-1621. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
General
Boxes 105, 108, and 113 returned to the office of origin.
Gurowitz, William D. Cornell University -- : Administration.
